title: campanula elatines var. garganica
intro: Campanula elatines var. garganica, also known as the Garganica or Spiked Bellflower, is a flowering plant in the Campanula genus. It is a low-growing, perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Campanula elatines var. garganica are typically made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
